q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares campaign vs non-campaign days (two observed groups) rather than comparing the observed value to an expected/baseline/assumed value, so criterion (a) is not met.
q_aware_rationale: The numerical values (12,616.93 / 1,834 and 9,693.25 / 484) are correctly summarized and a clear verdict ('directly supported') is given.
